message:
fix(fsfs): replace panic-on-poisoned-mutex with lock_or_recover in lifecycle tracker

Replace .lock().expect("...") calls in LifecycleTracker with
lock_or_recover() helper that recovers from poisoned mutexes instead
of panicking. Removes redundant "# Panics" doc sections since the
methods no longer panic on lock contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
